display_information.name: Knot
display_information.description: Tie up a loose end safely.
display_information.long_description: Knot is a Slack-native outcome coordinator. It turns a selected message into a confirmed Outcome Contract, gets one accountable owner to accept, makes the next move explicit, and only performs a previewed, authorized, reversible Slack update before owner-attested closure evidence is policy-checked.

shortcuts.name: Tie it up with Knot
shortcuts.description: Turn this message into a safe, owner-accepted outcome.
